name: MAGEN: KUCHIRAKU NO JUTSU (DEMONIC MIRAGE: MOUTH OF HELL TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu

Rank: 8

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, H

The subject sees the ground beneath their feet crumbling, and feels itself fall into the fiery pits of hell. The technique progresses in stages, one per round:

First round: The subject is unable to take action as they feel themselves begin to fall, suffering 3d6 nonlethal damage.

Second round: The subject also becomes unaware of its surroundings as it falls deeper into the pit, suffering 6d6 nonlethal damage.

Final round: The subject feels itself swallowed by dark, malevolent flames as deadly vines tear it apart. Suffering 12d6 nonlethal damage. It is still unable to act. If the subject is still conscious, it will be overcome by an irrational fear and will be @Condition[cowering]{cowering} for 1d4 rounds (Will negates).

Note: If using optional rules for stacking nonlethal damage, the technique deals 2d6, 4d6 and 8d6 damage (in the first, second and third round, respectively) instead.

While under the illusion, the subject is likely to scream and thrash about. If it takes any damage from a source other than this technique, the illusion immediately breaks. Blind creatures are immune to this technique. This technique can be dispelled.
